analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet, after reviewing reports on a bleak anti-corruption history, asserts three points: a new commission has a mandate grounded in international and national law (not a donor fad), the EU has never blocked any investigation, and there is no alternative to functioning national institutions. This defends EU conduct and emphasizes institutional functionality. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (EU as a successful story): Not promoted; no reflection on EU’s historical successes or learning from past traumas. EU2 (EU is united): Not addressed; no mention of EU internal unity or agreement among member states. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens within the EU): Not applicable; the tweet concerns anti-corruption context and EU stance on investigations, likely in a partner country context, not internal EU benefits. EU4 (EU avant-garde): Not claimed; no pioneering regulations discussed. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes): Partly aligned; stating “#EU has never blocked any investigation” implicitly portrays the EU as supporting accountability and rule of law, consistent with defending fair causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): Also partly aligned; highlighting EU’s non-obstruction and support for lawful, functional national institutions suggests the EU’s constructive role abroad in governance and cooperation. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU5 and EU6.
